data.title: Alcoa Warns Tariffs Could Cost $425 Million Annually: 'This Is The Most Material Impact' Says CEO
data.description: Alcoa Corp. the largest aluminum producer in the United States, reported $20 million in additional costs during its first quarter.

data.description: Uber CEO advises Gen Z leaders to embrace engineering and liberal arts education, citing his own success in tech industry and as a CEO.

data.title: Jim Cramer Calls Nvidia A 'Meme Stock' That Needs To Be Trimmed: 'You Can't Own It Like You Used To'
data.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer has told investors about Nvidia's transformation into a "meme stock," following a significant earnings hit due to U.S. export restrictions.
